    • import { Component, OnInit, Input } from '@angular/core'; @Component({ selector: 'app-upcoming-activities', templateUrl: './upcoming-activities.component.html', styleUrls: ['./upcoming-activities.component.scss'] }) /** * Upcoming Activites Component */ export class UpcomingActivitiesComponent implements OnInit { // Upcoming Activities @Input() UpcomingActivities: Array<{ date?: string; day?: string; time?: string; content?: string; users: Array<{ name?: string; profile?: string; variant?: string; }>; }> | undefined; constructor() { } ngOnInit(): void { } }
